name: Green Meatballs (Meatless)
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen chopped spinach, thawed and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and mix by hand until well combined.
- If the mixture is too soft, add more breadcrumbs.
3. Form the mixture into small meatball-sized balls.
4. Spray a cookie sheet with Pam cooking spray.
5. Place the meatballs on the prepared cookie sheet.
6. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until cooked through and golden brown.
